channel.title: Cadence 步频 — PT Research Signal
channel.description: Daily curated physical therapy & rehab research for clinicians. AI-scored signal from 50+ journals.

item.title: Critically appraised papers: Adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain [synopsis].
item.description: 一篇批判性评估的论文指出，对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛，增加物理治疗或励志短信并不能比单纯居家锻炼更好地改善疼痛。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Recent highlights in motor recovery and rehabilitation research after stroke.
item.description: 一项系统搜索并纳入 118 项 RCT、RCT 方案和系统综述的文献回顾，总结了 2020 年以来卒中后运动恢复和康复研究的最新进展，并为未来的试验提供了建议。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Smallest worthwhile effect of anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction compared with non-surgical management: a benefit-harm trade-off study.
item.description: 一项针对 92 名休闲或竞技运动员的利弊权衡研究，估计了前交叉韧带 (ACL) 重建加康复与单纯康复在改善膝关节功能和重返运动方面的最小有益效应。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [commentary].
item.description: 一篇批判性评估的论文指出，对于慢性阻塞性肺疾病，移动端肺康复在改善运动能力方面与中心肺康复效果相当，但在改善健康状况方面更优。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: The Psychometric Properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale Used After Stroke: A Systematic Review Using COSMIN Methodology.
item.description: A systematic review using COSMIN methodology evaluated the measurement properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale (TIS) in individuals with stroke, finding that while widely used, the quality and certainty of evidence regarding its psychometric properties have been unclear.
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Two-Year Outcomes of the Proximal Hamstring Avulsion Rehabilitation Regimes: Longitudinal Versus Accelerated Protocol (PHARRLAP) Study: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
item.description: A randomized controlled trial with 60 patients undergoing proximal hamstring tendon repair for acute avulsions found that a conservative rehabilitation (CR) pathway and an accelerated rehabilitation (AR) pathway yielded comparable 2-year clinical outcomes, strength recovery, functional symmetry, and complication/re-injury rates.
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Patterns of Outcome Measure Utilization in Stroke Rehabilitation Lower Extremity Trials Conducted in Low-to-Middle versus High-Income Countries.
item.description: 一项系统综述分析了 1548 项卒中下肢运动康复 RCT，发现中低收入国家比高收入国家更多使用依赖观察而非患者直接参与的通用功能障碍和日常生活活动结局测量工具。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Anti-Compensatory Saccades Changes After Visuo-Vestibular Physical Therapy in People With Acute Unilateral Vestibulopathy: A Prospective Observational Study.
item.description: 一项前瞻性观察研究纳入 92 名急性单侧前庭病患者，发现经过 8 周视觉-前庭物理治疗后，患者的代偿性扫视（通过 SHIMP 评估）表现出显著改善。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Prioritising fall prevention strategies in Parkinson's disease: A multi-method evaluation.
item.description: 一项多方法研究整合了叙述性综述、Delphi 专家共识（15 名多学科专家）和最佳-最差方法，量化优先排序了帕金森病患者的跌倒预防策略。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Associations of neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing with rehabilitation outcomes in patients with stroke.
item.description: 一项前瞻性观察研究发现，卒中后住院康复患者中神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与较差的 Barthel 指数、Brunnstrom 分期和生活质量评分相关，但在调整混杂因素后，仅疼痛灾难化与部分结局指标独立相关。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
item.description: 一项准实验研究对 72 名机构养老的肌少症老年人进行了 12 周体感游戏干预，结果显示，干预组在身体（膝关节伸肌力量增加 12.3%、6MWT 增加 18.5%）、心理和社交结局方面均有显著改善。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
item.description: A retrospective cohort study of 333 adult patients undergoing elective ACDF found that sarcopenia increases the risk of radiographic adjacent segment degeneration development within 3 years of index surgery.
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Role of Platelet-Rich Plasma Injection in Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials
item.description: A meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials investigated the role of platelet-rich plasma injection in anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction.
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Personalized blood flow restriction training at variable occlusion pressures improves multisystem function in overweight and obese older women - European Journal of Applied Physiology
item.description: This research found that personalized blood flow restriction training at variable occlusion pressures improved multisystem function in overweight and obese older women.
item.author: Sports Medicine

item.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
item.description: 一项对 1688 名全膝关节置换术患者的回顾性队列研究发现，术前物理治疗组与非治疗组在术后 2 个月和 1 年的 KOOS-PS 评分、疼痛、遗忘关节评分和 EQ-5D-5L 方面无显著差异。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
item.description: 一项针对 60 名上斜方肌肌筋膜疼痛综合征患者的 RCT 发现，单独治疗性按摩、常规物理治疗或两者结合均能改善疼痛、压力痛阈、肌肉活动度、功能障碍和生活质量。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: The WalkBack (walking and education) program for prevention of low back pain is acceptable to physiotherapists but relies on training, flexibility and system-level enablers to optimise implementation: a qualitative study.
item.description: 一项针对 20 名澳大利亚物理治疗师的定性研究发现，WalkBack（步行和教育）腰痛预防项目是可接受的，但其实施优化依赖于培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Decision support in the management of musculoskeletal disorders: a qualitative study of physiotherapists' and patients' experiences.
item.description: 一项挪威的定性研究探讨了人工智能驱动的临床决策支持系统 SupportPrim PT 如何影响物理治疗师和肌骨疾患患者的决策过程，发现它对决策权威性有一定影响。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Developing a patient decision aid for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome: A mixed-methods study.
item.description: 一项混合方法研究开发并用户测试了一种患者决策辅助工具，用于比较股髋关节撞击综合征（FAIS）的非手术管理和髋关节镜检查，其中包括一个针对军事人群的附加部分。
item.author: PubMed

item.title: Inter-rater reliability and construct validity of a cross-diagnostic movement quality score for rehabilitation assessment.
item.description: 一项横断面研究评估了标准物理治疗评估 (SPTA) 中运动质量评分 (MQS) 跨诊断组（神经、肌肉骨骼、内科）的评估者间信度（ICC [2,1] = 0.92）和构效度（与 FIM 运动总分相关性 r = 0.69）。
item.author: PubMed
